meta.src: US Census ACS 2023 1-Year PUMS (person + housing), weighted; 2020 PUMAs (NYC DCP pikk-p9nv)
meta.note: PUMS is a weighted sample at PUMA (~community-district) resolution; neighborhood queries map the NTA to its containing PUMA. Estimates carry sampling error.
